choices.text: VFR (Visual Flight Rules): pilot navigates visually; see + avoid; weather mins required. IFR (Instrument Flight Rules): pilot uses instruments; through clouds; requires instrument rating, current avionics, filed flight plan, ATC clearance throughout.
Request pop-up IFR clearance from ATC: "Request IFR clearance to [destination]". Avoids dangerous VFR into IMC. VFR into IMC = leading cause of fatal GA accidents. Or 180° turn back to clear weather.

questions.explanation: Pop-up IFR or 180° turn; avoid IMC.
